title: guettarda aromatica
intro: Guettarda aromatica, also known as the fragrant guettarda, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Guettarda aromatica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as aiding in the management of respiratory problems like bronchitis. Guettarda aromatica can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its leaves can be crushed and applied topically to release their medicinal properties.
